data.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co. reports 1.4% increase in net sales for full year 2025, with GAAP EPS declining by 25% to $2.63.
data.description: Colgate-Palmolive Company reported a 1.4% increase in both full-year Net sales and Organic sales, despite a 0.7% negative impact from decreased private label pet volume. GAAP EPS decreased by 25% to $2.63 due to impairment charges linked to the skin health business, while Base Business EPS rose by 3% to $3.69. The company achieved a record net cash provided by operations of $4,198 for the year and returned $2.9 billion to shareholders through dividends and share buybacks.

data.title: 2025 wildfire season by Cornea detailed with record human, economic impacts. 65,000+ wildfires burn effects on individuals and systems.
data.description: In New York, the 2025 wildfire season has brought significant changes in the management and financial burden of wildfire risk, as per a recent analysis by Cornea. The report highlights a shift in the trend of wildfires, which are no longer limited to a particular season or region. Winter fires have become catastrophic, leading to increased health issues due to smoke exposure, along with rising costs that are being passed on to consumers through utilities, insurance, and housing systems. The analysis reveals that over 65,000 wildfires have been recorded.

data.title: OTC Markets Group welcomes AltaGas Ltd. to OTCQX Best Market; 12,000 securities traded. AltaGas upgraded from Pink Limited.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that AltaGas Ltd., a prominent North American infrastructure firm, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group operates regulated markets for trading over 12,000 U.S. and international securities. AltaGas Ltd. (TSX: ALA; OTCQX: ATGFF) transitioned to the OTCQX from the Pink Limited™ Market.

data.title: Tonix Pharmaceuticals showcased Phase 3 RESILIENT data on TONMYA for fibromyalgia pain at Non-Opioid Pain Therapeutics Summit, showing notable pain reduction compared to placebo.
data.description: In the Phase 3 RESILIENT study, TONMYA showed a substantial decrease in fibromyalgia pain when compared to a placebo. The results displayed a significant improvement in pain levels, highlighting the effectiveness of TONMYA in managing fibromyalgia symptoms. This analysis underscores the potential of TONMYA in providing relief for individuals suffering from fibromyalgia, showcasing a promising advancement in treatment options for this condition. These findings offer hope to the estimated 10 million people in the United States alone who are affected by fibromyalgia, indicating a positive impact on managing their pain and overall quality of life.

data.title: KRAKacquisition Corp closes $345M IPO with 34.5M units sold at $10 each, including extra 4.5M from over-allotment option.
data.description: Cheyenne, Wyoming, USA - January 30, 2026 - KRAKacquisition Corp revealed the completion of its enlarged initial public offering of 34,500,000 units, with an extra 4,500,000 units sold through the full exercise of the underwriter's over-allotment option. Priced at $10.00 per unit, the offering generated $345 million in gross proceeds for the Company, exclusive of underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses related to the offering. The special purpose acquisition company is sponsored by affiliates of Natural Capital, Tribe Capital, and Payward, Inc.
